Main test files for entity-family matches by ownership:

- **Drone**: `tests/integration/entities/drone_flat/test_drone_flat_tech_spawn_and_on_kill.gd` (spawning, techs, necromancy/thrust multipliers), `test_drone_flat_init_respawn_and_populate.gd` (init/respawn contract), `test_drone_flat_core_tick_and_targeting.gd` (tick/targeting), `test_drone_flat_damage_callbacks_and_visuals.gd` (damage/callbacks), `test_drone_flat_fire_and_modes.gd` (fire/modes). Key runtime file: `entities/drone_flat/dron
